标题: Loewe fleece straight-leg pants offer a blend of comfort and drape, made from a fabric mix of 96% viscose fiber and 4% spandex. The viscose fiber provides a natural softness and skin-friendly feel, with a delicate and smooth touch like a second skin. The addition of spandex gives the fabric a slight stretch, allowing for easy movement without feeling restricted. The fabric also has excellent drape, enhancing the clean and smooth lines of the straight-leg design, maintaining a poised and elegant look whether standing still or in motion. Sizes available: M-3XL. Measurements in centimeters: M: Hip 55, Waist 74, Length 103. L: Hip 57, Waist 79, Length 105. XL: Hip 58, Waist 84, Length 107. XXL: Hip 61, Waist 87, Length 107. XXXL: Hip 63, Waist 90, Length 107.

LOEWE straight-leg fleece-lined trousers have a post-wash weight of about 420g, with a thick, sturdy, and vintage feel; the brand logo is full and highlights delicacy and luxury; sand washing gives the fabric a unique texture and soft touch, with precise color control for a natural and layered fading effect; the distressed finish gives a vintage look, rich in character, blending fashion and craftsmanship perfectly. Sizes available: M-XXL.

LOEWE straight-leg fleece-lined trousers have a post-wash weight of about 420g, with a thick, sturdy, and vintage feel; the brand logo is full and highlights delicacy and luxury; sand washing gives the fabric a unique texture and soft touch, with precise color control for a natural and layered fading effect; the distressed finish gives a vintage look, rich in character, blending fashion and craftsmanship perfectly. Loewe On collaboration functional sports pants are made of 100% polyester fiber technology fabric for both the main body and lining. This synthetic fiber, treated specially, offers lightweight, high strength, quick-drying, and water-repellent properties, making it ideal for functional clothing. Mesh lining in key areas significantly enhances breathability, promotes air circulation, prevents stuffiness, ensuring both protection and comfort. The Anagram On embossed rubber label on the waistband is molded and heat-pressed, durable, three-dimensional, and unique in texture. The workwear pockets and reflective LOEWE On prints on the legs are achieved through reflective ink printing, appearing subtle grey in daylight but highly reflective under direct light at night, greatly enhancing visibility and safety in dim environments. The pocket system is the core function of work pants, with flap pockets designed in a three-dimensional structure for secure storage and reinforced workwear style. Multiple side and back waterproof zip pockets, using waterproof sealed zippers or laminated waterproof fabrics, provide absolute protection for important items, making them impervious to rain. The overall stitching is straight and delicate, fabric comfortable and soft, color consistent without deviation, allowing for stylish coordination and versatility for various occasions. Customized accessories, complete with three labels, available in unisex sizes XS-L.

LOEWE straight-leg trousers have a post-wash weight of about 420g, with a thick, sturdy, and durable texture that exudes a vintage charm. The 3D printing technique is impressive, with a full and exquisite brand logo that highlights sophistication and luxury. The sand wash treatment gives the fabric a unique texture and soft touch, while the precise dyeing process ensures natural fading with a rich sense of depth. The distressed finish gives a weathered look, enhancing the vintage style and individuality of each pair of pants, making it a perfect blend of fashion and craftsmanship. Sizes available: M-3XL.

LOEWE classic knit cotton sporty casual trousers, recommended for couples with LW classic anagram embellishment, very recognizable. Made of high-quality fiber knit looped cotton fabric, the delicate and orderly knitting craftsmanship creates the original soft texture of cotton. Sizes available: M-4XL.

Loewe 2025SS autumn/winter new jeans feature a tailored slim fit design that is more suitable for Asian body types. Imported hardware accessories with brand logo-engraved buttons. The denim fabric has undergone multiple washes, with a small leather waist label at the back. The details are meticulously crafted, showcasing perfection. Made of pure cotton denim fabric, the washed color and texture are exquisite. Comfortable to wear, it enhances body shape and exudes elegance. The fabric is skin-friendly, allowing for a pressure-free fit. The moderate thickness retains the durability and breathability of denim. The inner lining is made of skin-friendly cotton material, including pocket fabric. The jeans have a strong visual impact and exquisite craftsmanship, ensuring top quality. Sizes range from 29 to 40, excluding 35, 37, and 39.

Loewe cotton belt jacket and casual pants set, featuring a medium-weight dyed cotton satin jacket with front pleats and a decorative contrasting color belt. Regular fit, standard length, classic collar, front zip closure, buttoned cuffs, seam pockets, inner stitched pocket, fully lined, chest Anagram embroidery, back LOEWE embossed leather patch. Sizes: 44-46-48-50 XS-L.

Loewe's patchwork plaid hooded half-zip training suit set features fabric made of custom-dyed high-density plaid fabric with a minimum order of 1000 meters. The thread is an 8-thread knitted fabric for patchwork. The hardware includes custom engraving on antique silver zippers. The precise craftsmanship ensures straight and delicate stitching, comfortable and soft fabric with consistent color. It can be styled with the same design for a fashionable look suitable for various occasions. Customized accessories, complete with three labels, available in unisex sizes from M to 3XL. The vintage-style distressing adds character, making each pair unique and a perfect blend of fashion and craftsmanship. Sizes available: M-3XL.

LOEWE Ribbed High Neck Embroidered Jacquard Jacket and Pants Set, made with premium silk double-sided custom fabric woven on imported high-density looms for clear patterns and a structured fit. Lined with breathable D cotton mesh fabric. The jacket features herringbone cuffs and hem with wool content for comfort. Intricate LOEWE Anagram embroidery on the chest. Custom cotton and metallic yarn letter trims. Alloy matte white zipper with brand logo, leather pull tab. Nylon lining, cotton pocket fabric for functionality and style. Loose fit with standard length, practical and stylish front zipper closure and inset pockets. Sizes: S-XL.

LOEWE Ribbed High Neck Embroidered Jacquard Jacket and Pants Set, made with premium silk double-sided custom fabric woven on imported high-density looms for clear patterns and a structured fit. Custom cotton and metallic yarn letter trims. Alloy matte white zipper with brand logo, leather pull tab. Nylon lining, cotton pocket fabric for functionality and style. Loose fit with standard length, practical and stylish front zipper closure and inset pockets. Sizes: S-XL.

Loewe Anagram denim jeans feature a tight double-core yarn for a comfortable and skin-friendly feel, with a rich texture. The knee area is embellished with laser-cut Anagram, a classic Loewe leather label, adding a high-tech and distinctive touch. The jeans are meticulously crafted with laser-cut Anagram patterns, hand-applied inner patches, and hand-sewn finishes, resulting in high production costs, high wastage, and low daily output. Imported specialized machinery with infrared positioning ensures precise and sturdy placement of the "Loewe" label. The jeans undergo a complex process of washing and dyeing, using specially formulated desizing agents for even dye absorption, followed by rinsing. The sizing information is not provided.

Loewe SS light blue loose straight-leg distressed men's casual jeans, featuring a new American-style design. This fashionable and versatile item has a loose and relaxed cut, ergonomic slanted pockets, and wide-leg design for a comfortable fit. Made of high-quality denim cotton fabric, the light blue color and summer-appropriate washing process create a fresh and clean look. Available in sizes XS to L.

Loewe color-blocked casual trousers feature a tech flat knit fabric with contrasting color stripes and Anagram embroidery. The fabric is made of polyester fibers for a sporty feel. The polyester fibers are dyed with eco-friendly dyes before spinning, ensuring high strength and elasticity, making the trousers durable, wrinkle-resistant, and easy to care for. The intricate Anagram embroidery is done with white thread using precise stitching techniques. The embroidery is dense and finely crafted, combining linen thread for a subtle matte finish. Special treatment is applied to the embroidery surface for smoothness, and the flat stitching technique is used for finishing the overall embroidery pattern. The mid-rise relaxed fit trousers have a wide leg design for a flattering vertical effect that suits all body types. They feature herringbone tape detailing on the sides, zipper pockets on the sides and back, and a comfortable fit with a range of sizes from XS to L.

LOEWE 2025fw cotton twill work pants are made of lightweight cotton twill fabric. The fabric is woven with a twill weave, creating a diagonal pattern. The cotton material provides good breathability and comfort, while the twill weave gives the fabric a tight structure and a high-quality texture. Available in sizes 46-52.

The complete Loewe 2025ss Angpao collaboration pocket print short-sleeve T-shirt and shorts set, featuring Angpao and collaboration design, blending functionality and aesthetics, focusing on details. Seamlessly combining outdoor and urban styles, exploring boundless possibilities. The outdoor T-shirt from the collaboration is made with high-performance recycled knit fabric, lightweight, breathable, and dynamically fits the body, ensuring comfort during every run and exploration. The hidden zipper pocket design in the outdoor fabric cleverly stores small items securely, with a custom blue invisible zipper that combines practicality and minimalist aesthetics, complementing the classic brand's blue logo. Whether hiking in the mountains or strolling in the city, the craftsmanship shines through in every detail. Sizes: M-3XL.
